title: clinopodium multicaule var. minimum
intro: Clinopodium multicaule var. minimum, also known as dwarf Clinopodium, is a low-growing shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It belongs to the mint family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Clinopodium multicaule var. minimum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Clinopodium multicaule var. minimum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
